description_long: This is a single low-top casual shoe with a rounded toe and a smooth, matte brown leather upper. The shoe features visible double stitching along the seams and side panels, adding both durability and a subtle decorative element. It has a standard criss-cross lacing system with beige laces threaded through six pairs of eyelets. The collar and tongue are lightly padded for comfort, and the interior appears to be lined with a soft material. The sole is a light tan color, made from a flexible rubber or synthetic material, and is slightly raised at the heel for ergonomic support. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A brown leather low-top casual shoe with beige laces, double stitching, and a light tan rubber sole. The design is simple, comfortable, and unbranded.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, beige laces, and symmetrical stitching along the upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the double-stitched side panels, padded collar, and the full profile of the light tan sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel seam, padded collar, and the slightly raised heel of the sole.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the stitching details and the ergonomic curve of the sole.
